title: Propositional Logic Basics

solver_reuse.pressure: Tiny CNF UNSAT proof emission plus independent DRAT and LRAT rechecking.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote the remaining SAT witness, tautology-by-negation, contradiction, and equivalence rows only when they add distinct Boolean regression pressure.

graduation_criteria: Encode each Boolean row as deterministic Axeyum Bool terms.
Replay SAT assignments through Axeyum model evaluation.
Emit deterministic CNF for UNSAT rows.
Produce and check DRAT/LRAT evidence for the tiny CNF refutation and tautology-by-negation rows.
